summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WriteGenius AI Writing Assistant SaaS. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with one development error overlay issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Development error overlay blocking interactions after content generation
ui_bugs.details: Clipboard write permission error causing overlay to appear and block template selection buttons

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
Usage counter displays correctly for free users
Premium badge displays for admin users
Pricing page displays both plans correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix development error overlay issue that appears after content generation - clipboard permission error blocking UI interactions
